subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-19
subcodes.first_line: ...In future you will see far greater gatherings... Yes. What could be greater than this war?...
subcodes.subjects: @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @martyrdom of the Bab, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @non-participation in politics, @universal peace; world unity, @predictions and prophecies, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
